title: 腹が減っては巡回できぬ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today has been absurdly busy. I drag myself up to
the rooftop to take a quick break, but when I get
there...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
How are things, Biko? Have there been any
baddies lurking about?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
All is well on campus today! How are things at
your end?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Everything's fine with me, too! Lunch was
delicious, and everyone's good and happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Biko and I were just in the middle of
our patrol around school! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Biko patrols every day to protect the peace of
the academy!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Listen up, trainer of Bono! If you
have any woes or worries, let me know so I can
lend you my aid!
choice_data_list: I've been really fatigued lately, actually...
Do you have any tricks for conserving stamina?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What?! That's terrible! Have you eaten yet? Wait
right there! I'll be right back with some fresh
chanko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
That's the wrong way to go about things, Bono! If
you make too much food, you'll only send your
trainer into a food coma!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
And you can't defeat a villain if you're in a food
coma, unable to move at the most critical
moment! The true solution is to raise your
trainer's baseline endurance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: At least, that's what Carrot Ranger says!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see! So, what if we try moving lots and
then eating lots?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that sounds great! Come, let's patrol the
school together!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Roger! Just say the word if you start getting tired,
okay, Trainer? I'll help keep you on your feet! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, going along with Biko Pegasus's
suggestion, I join their patrol while Hishi Akebono
keeps me upright by supporting my back.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: All clear!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All clear! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Okay, next location!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: All clear!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All clear! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Nice! All is at peace!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After surveying every possible nook and cranny
on campus, I finally hit my limit and slump down
into a crouch.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hm?! Are you all right there?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear! Hang in there, Trainer! Here, I'll carry
you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She hefts me up before I even get the chance to
tell her I'll be fine after a breather.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Incredible as always, Bono! There's clearly
nothing to worry about with your baseline
endurance!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I think I got a little stronger today, too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming with us today, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'll make some yummy food for you once we get
back, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I savor the dinner Hishi Akebono kindly prepares,
and soon my tired body is soothed back to
normal.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Have some meat! It'll help with your stamina! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
She's right! Carrot Ranger eats curry with big
chunks of meat in it! Come, Bono! The time for
sustenance has come!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You've got it! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you chew your food properly! That
makes it easier for your body to absorb all the
nutrients.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: And you'll feel way more energetic, too!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: "Way more"?! Amazing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Chewing carefully helps with digestion, and that
leads to you getting hungry again!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I get it! So the next step is to eat more and regain
your energy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! And if you keep repeating those steps,
then you'll be able to maintain your stamina
perfectly! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
All right, from now on, let's eat a whole heap of
meat before we go on our patrols!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I've got it covered! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a grin on her face, Hishi Akebono starts
laying out dish after delicious dish as Biko
Pegasus watches in amazement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sight of the hearty chunks of meat coupled
with the aroma of the curry is enough to bolster
my stamina tenfold!

text_block_list.name: Akebono and Biko
text_block_list.text: Let's dig in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us enjoy our meal together, then
patrol the school until evening.
